title: Asia markets mostly rise as investors assess Iran conflict impact on energy supplies
summary_full: Overnight, oil prices broke through the $80 per barrel mark, with Brent futures up 3.54% and last trading at $84.31.
summary_public: Overnight, oil prices broke through the $80 per barrel mark, with Brent futures up 3.54% and last trading at $84.31.
